mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attachfile(attachfileno, communityno, fname, fupname, thumb, fsize, rdate, is_dog) VALUES(attachfile_seq.nextval, #{communityno}, #{fname}, #{fupname}, #{thumb}, #{fsize}, sysdate, 'N')
mapper.select: SELECT attachfileno, communityno, fname, fupname, thumb, fsize, rdate, is_dog FROM attachfile WHERE communityno = #{communityno} ORDER BY attachfileno ASC

SELECT attachfileno, communityno, thumb, is_dog FROM ( SELECT attachfileno, communityno, thumb, is_dog, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY communityno ORDER BY attachfileno ASC) as rn FROM attachfile WHERE communityno = #{communityno} AND is_dog = 'Y' ) WHERE rn = 1
